hero.subtitle: Building local capacity, fostering innovation, and amplifying African voices in the global conversation on Frontier Climate Technologies

about.heading: From the Sidelines to the Forefront
about.body: ECF is dedicated to empowering African institutions and policymakers to drive FCTs through inclusive, science-driven, and contextually relevant approaches. We foster capacity, collaboration, and movement building to ensure African institutions and communities lead FCTs efforts, shaping equitable global climate governance with dignity and agency.

thematic.heading: Our Thematic Focus Areas
thematic.description: ECF's work spans three interconnected frontier climate technologies, each critical to Africa's climate resilience and global climate governance.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence for Climate Adaptation
ai.description: Harnessing AI to develop high-quality climate data systems, early warning mechanisms, and adaptive solutions tailored to Africa's unique climate challenges. We're building local AI infrastructure and expertise to ensure real-time, context-specific climate responses that serve African communities first.

cdr.title: Carbon Dioxide Removal (CDR)
cdr.description: Exploring and scaling nature-based and technological carbon removal solutions that align with Africa's ecosystems and economic realities. From biochar initiatives to coastal blue carbon projects, we're ensuring Africa leads in defining what responsible CDR looks like on the continent.

srm.title: Solar Radiation Management (SRM)
srm.description: Leading rigorous, ethical research into SRM's potential impacts on African climate systems, agriculture, and communities. We ensure African scientists and policymakers have the knowledge and platforms to shape global SRM governance decisions that could profoundly affect the continent.

achievements.heading: What We Are Proud Of
achievements.subtitle: ECF builds on a strong foundation of achievements that demonstrate our commitment to empowering African leadership in climate technologies
achievements.marquee: Empowering Africa to Lead the Climate Technology Frontier

courses.label: University Short Courses
courses.description: Partnered with universities in Ghana, Kenya, and South Africa

placed.label: Strategically Placed
placed.description: In industries and public institutions including Ghana's carbon market office

fellowship.label: ACIFER Fellowship
fellowship.description: Africa's first fellowship for early-career climate intervention researchers

featuredProjects.heading: Featured Projects
featuredProjects.description: See how ECF's work is transforming climate technology capacity across Africa

climateData.title: Climate Data Infrastructure
climateData.description: Building AI-powered climate monitoring systems across East Africa

blueCarbon.title: Coastal Blue Carbon Initiative
blueCarbon.description: Restoring mangrove ecosystems for carbon sequestration in West Africa

srmNetwork.title: SRM Research Network
srmNetwork.description: Leading ethical research on solar radiation management impacts

biochar.title: Biochar Production Scaling
biochar.description: Scaling sustainable biochar solutions for carbon removal

partners.heading: Our Partners
partners.description: Over the past 3 years with our work on CDR and SRM, we have collaborated with a diverse network of organizations, academic institutions, and initiatives to drive African-led climate intervention strategies.
